tasks.label: Init
tasks.description: Create Linux module dev starter files from template folder

tasks.label: Build Module
tasks.command: MOD_DIR=${MODULE_DIR:-$PWD/hello}; if [ ! -d "$MOD_DIR" ]; then if [ -d "$PWD/l01" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/l01"; elif [ -d "$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld"; elif [ -f "$PWD/Makefile" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD"; else echo "Missing module directory: $MOD_DIR"; exit 1; fi; fi; make -C "$MOD_DIR"

tasks.label: Clean Module
tasks.command: MOD_DIR=${MODULE_DIR:-$PWD/hello}; if [ ! -d "$MOD_DIR" ]; then if [ -d "$PWD/l01" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/l01"; elif [ -d "$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld"; elif [ -f "$PWD/Makefile" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD"; else echo "Missing module directory: $MOD_DIR"; exit 1; fi; fi; make -C "$MOD_DIR" clean

tasks.label: Insert Module
tasks.description: Insert module into the running kernel
tasks.command: MOD_DIR=${MODULE_DIR:-$PWD/hello}; if [ ! -d "$MOD_DIR" ]; then if [ -d "$PWD/l01" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/l01"; elif [ -d "$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld"; elif [ -f "$PWD/Makefile" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD"; else echo "Missing module directory: $MOD_DIR"; exit 1; fi; fi; KO_FILE=$(ls "$MOD_DIR"/*.ko 2>/dev/null | head -n1); if [ -z "$KO_FILE" ]; then echo "No .ko file found in $MOD_DIR"; exit 1; fi; sudo insmod "$KO_FILE"

tasks.label: Remove Module
tasks.description: Remove module from the running kernel
tasks.command: MOD_DIR=${MODULE_DIR:-$PWD/hello}; if [ ! -d "$MOD_DIR" ]; then if [ -d "$PWD/l01" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/l01"; elif [ -d "$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD/lkm-001-helloworld"; elif [ -f "$PWD/Makefile" ]; then MOD_DIR="$PWD"; fi; fi; KO_FILE=$(ls "$MOD_DIR"/*.ko 2>/dev/null | head -n1); MODULE_NAME=${MODULE_NAME:-$(basename "$KO_FILE" .ko)}; if [ -z "$MODULE_NAME" ]; then echo "No module name found. Set MODULE_NAME or build first."; exit 1; fi; sudo rmmod "$MODULE_NAME"
